e_waste_rules_2022.who_must_file: Producers, Manufacturers, Refurbishers, Recyclers of EEE listed in Schedule I
e_waste_rules_2022.reporting_frequency: Quarterly returns (end of month succeeding quarter) + Annual returns
e_waste_rules_2022.brsr_id_convention: P{principle}-E{essential_indicator} or P{principle}-L{leadership_indicator}, aligned to SEBI BRSR 2023 format

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of EEE placed in market, by product code (units / weight)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, whether entity has EPR plan, and quantity of EEE sold forming basis of liability
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly usable as BRSR EPR denominator. No gap for this specific field.

data_already_tracked.metric: E-waste recycling target obligation (MT), per Schedule III / IV
data_already_tracked.source_rule: Rule 6(2), Schedule III (60–80% of Y-X sales), Schedule IV (15–20% for new producers)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, target quantity for the year
data_already_tracked.gap: Target is auto-calculated on CPCB portal. BRSR needs both target and actual; this is the target half.

data_already_tracked.metric: EPR certificates purchased from registered recyclers (kg, by certificate denomination)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered through recycling, E-waste category (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Proves actual quantity recycled via formal channel. BRSR needs this alongside other waste categories (plastic, bio-medical, etc.).

data_already_tracked.metric: Refurbishing certificates purchased (kg)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Products reclaimed at end of life, reused / refurbished (MT and % of total products sold)
data_already_tracked.gap: Quantity is directly available. BRSR also needs this as a percentage of total products sold, denominator must be derived from sales data.

data_already_tracked.metric: Deferred EPR liability from refurbishing (75% carry-forward quantity, MT, target year)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, deferred obligations and future-year liabilities
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR does not explicitly ask for deferred EPR; useful as a note in the EPR narrative section.

data_already_tracked.metric: EPR obligation shortfall / unfulfilled carry-forward (MT, by year)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Show cause / compounding / penalty, details of non-compliance with environmental laws
data_already_tracked.gap: Shortfall is a compliance gap. BRSR asks for all environmental non-compliance; this covers e-waste EPR specifically.

data_already_tracked.metric: Environmental compensation paid for EPR shortfall (INR, with refund % if addressed within 1–3 years)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Fines / penalties paid for non-compliance with environmental laws (INR)
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps. BRSR asks for all environmental fines; this covers e-waste penalties only. Other fines (air, water, hazardous waste) must be added separately.

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of e-waste generated during manufacturing (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated, E-waste category (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly usable as BRSR e-waste generation from own manufacturing operations.

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of e-waste collected by recycler (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated, E-waste category (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Relevant for entities that are themselves recyclers filing BRSR. For producers, this is third-party data supporting EPR certificate validity.

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of e-waste dismantled (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered through recycling (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Dismantling is an intermediate processing step. BRSR needs end-state classification: recycled vs. disposed. Must be aggregated with final recycling output.

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of e-waste recycled and materials recovered, precious metals, rare earth elements (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered through recycling (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps. Material recovery data also feeds into BRSR Principle 2 resource efficiency narrative.

data_already_tracked.metric: Fractions / materials sent to other registered recyclers (MT, recycler identity)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered through recycling (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Shows waste channelised but not yet finally recycled. Final recycling confirmation needed from receiving recycler.

data_already_tracked.metric: Residue from recycling disposed at authorised TSDF (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste disposed, landfill / incineration / other disposal (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Quantity is directly available. BRSR wants split by disposal method (incineration vs. secured landfill); e-waste filing may not break this down.

data_already_tracked.metric: Non-recyclable e-waste quantity and disposal details (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste disposed (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Quantity available. BRSR needs disposal method breakdown (incineration vs. landfill) which may not be captured in e-waste return.

data_already_tracked.metric: E-waste storage quantity, location and duration (MT, days, ≤180 days default)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste management practices adopted (narrative)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks for qualitative description of practices. Storage data supports the narrative but is not a standalone BRSR field.

data_already_tracked.metric: Sale, purchase and transfer records of e-waste (MT, counterparty, date)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated, E-waste category (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Transaction-level data supports audit trail. BRSR needs annual aggregated totals which must be computed from these records.

data_already_tracked.metric: E-waste generated by bulk consumer and handed over to registered entity (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated, E-waste category (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Bulk consumers filing BRSR can directly use this. Must also disclose recipient (recycler / refurbisher).

data_already_tracked.metric: Hazardous substance concentration in products, Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE (% by weight in homogenous materials)
data_already_tracked.source_rule: Rule 16(1), limits: 0.1% (Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE), 0.01% (Cd)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Sustainable sourcing, R&D and capex towards environmentally safer products / processes
data_already_tracked.gap: RoHS data covers restricted substance elimination. BRSR Principle 2 asks broader questions on sustainable sourcing and design; this is one input.

data_already_tracked.metric: RoHS self-declaration of conformance (per product)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Compliance with applicable environmental law / regulation, status
data_already_tracked.gap: Proves compliance with one environmental regulation. BRSR needs all applicable regulations listed.

data_already_tracked.metric: Product recall / corrective action records for RoHS non-compliance
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Number of product recalls on account of safety issues / consumer complaints
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps to BRSR product recall disclosure. BRSR also needs reasons and corrective actions taken.

data_already_tracked.metric: Random sampling and testing results for RoHS compliance
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Compliance with applicable environmental law, third-party verification
data_already_tracked.gap: Not a regular filing by the entity. Available only when CPCB initiates sampling. Can be cited as evidence of compliance if results are favorable.

data_already_tracked.metric: Solar PV waste inventory, quantity stored, by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated, E-waste category (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Solar PV waste has no recycling target until post-2034-35. BRSR still requires disclosure of waste generated. Only storage data available; no recycling data to report.

data_already_tracked.metric: Accident reports at e-waste processing facility or during transport (incident type, date, immediate report to SPCB)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of safety-related incidents, number of safety incidents, lost days, fatalities
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR Principle 3 asks for all workplace safety incidents across all operations. E-waste accident data covers only e-waste handling incidents.

data_already_tracked.metric: Awareness campaigns conducted on e-waste management (count, medium, reach)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Mechanisms for consumer awareness on sustainable usage, safe disposal, recycling of products
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks about consumer awareness across all product categories. E-waste rules mandate awareness specifically for e-waste disposal.

data_already_tracked.metric: Registration status on CPCB portal (active / revoked, registration ID, entity category)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Compliance with applicable environmental law, whether all required registrations are active
data_already_tracked.gap: Registration is a prerequisite, not an outcome metric. BRSR needs confirmation of active compliance across all regulations.

data_already_tracked.metric: Conversion factor Cf for recycling (input-output ratio per end product)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Lifecycle assessment / resource efficiency details
data_already_tracked.gap: Useful as material efficiency indicator. BRSR lifecycle assessment requires scope broader than recycling yield.

data_already_tracked.metric: EPR certificate transaction log (certificate number, denomination, buyer, seller, date, auto-adjustment against liability)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, details of EPR plan, fulfilment status
data_already_tracked.gap: Complete audit trail for EPR compliance. Directly feeds BRSR EPR disclosure.

data_already_tracked.metric: Registration revocation details (duration up to 3 years, cause, environmental compensation levied)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Show cause notices / compounding / penalties, details
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps to BRSR environmental non-compliance disclosure. Must include in BRSR if entity was subject to revocation.

data_already_tracked.metric: Workers involved in e-waste dismantling and recycling, registration and skill development (headcount)
data_already_tracked.reported_by: State Dept of Labour (not entity directly)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Workers covered by health and safety management system / skill development programmes
data_already_tracked.gap: State government tracks this. Entity may not hold this data directly. BRSR needs % of own workers covered by H&S systems across all operations.

data_already_tracked.metric: Hazardous waste transportation manifests for e-waste (per Hazardous Waste Rules 2016)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste disposed, transportation and disposal records
data_already_tracked.gap: Transport manifests support traceability. BRSR does not ask for transport-level detail but the aggregated disposal quantities these manifests prove.

plastic_waste_epr_2022.filing_name: Plastic Waste Management (Amendment) Rules, 2022, EPR Guidelines
plastic_waste_epr_2022.who_must_file: Producers (P), Importers (I), Brand Owners (BO) of plastic packaging; Plastic Waste Processors (PWPs) except cement kilns & road construction

data_already_tracked.metric: Average weight of plastic packaging material sold, last 2 FYs (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR P6-EI-7 asks for total EPR waste collected & recycled across all applicable waste streams; PWM filing only covers plastic packaging

data_already_tracked.metric: Average quantity of pre-consumer plastic packaging waste generated, last 2 FYs (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT), plastic waste
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires total plastic waste generated across operations; PWM tracks only pre-consumer packaging waste within EPR scope

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of plastic packaging sold to Brand Owners, last FY (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: Used to calculate net Producer/Importer obligation via deduction; BRSR asks for aggregate EPR outcome, not inter-entity allocation

data_already_tracked.metric: Average weight of plastic packaging waste purchased/introduced, last 2 FYs (MT) [Brand Owners]
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: Drives Brand Owner EPR liability (Q = D + B); BRSR asks for waste collected & recycled as outcome, not the input obligation quantity

data_already_tracked.metric: EPR Eligible Quantity, Q (MT), category-wise (Cat I–IV)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires stating whether EPR applies and providing collection/recycling data; the calculated Q directly feeds this disclosure

data_already_tracked.metric: Category-wise plastic packaging breakdown, Cat I (Rigid), Cat II (Flexible/MLP-plastic-only), Cat III (Multi-material MLP), Cat IV (Compostable)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT), plastic waste
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks for a single plastic-waste-generated figure; PWM tracks four packaging sub-categories but excludes non-packaging plastic waste

data_already_tracked.metric: Plastic packaging waste collected (MT), annual return
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered, recycling, reusing, other recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Collection is an upstream step; BRSR asks for waste actually recovered/recycled, not just collected

data_already_tracked.metric: Plastic packaging waste recycled (MT), annual return
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered, recycling, reusing, other recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps to BRSR's recycled-plastic-waste row; BRSR additionally requires other waste streams (e-waste, bio-medical, hazardous, etc.)

data_already_tracked.metric: Plastic packaging waste reused (MT), Brand Owners only
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste recovered, reusing (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Maps directly to reuse row under BRSR waste recovery; only tracked for Brand Owners, not Producers/Importers

data_already_tracked.metric: Recycled plastic content used in packaging (%/MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Reclaimed products and packaging materials, % of recycled input used
data_already_tracked.gap: Closely aligned; BRSR Leadership Indicator asks for recycled input as % of total material, PWM obligation tracks the same for plastic packaging only

data_already_tracked.metric: End-of-life disposal quantity (MT), co-processing, WtE, cement kiln, road construction, pyrolysis, gasification
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste disposed, incineration, landfilling, other disposal (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: PWM tracks disposal by method (co-processing, WtE, etc.); BRSR uses broader categories (incineration, landfill, other) and covers all waste types

data_already_tracked.metric: Registration certificate number on CPCB centralized portal
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Compliance with environmental laws, show-cause / penalty / fine details
data_already_tracked.gap: Registration status proves compliance; BRSR asks for non-compliance incidents, penalties, and corrective actions, not registration itself

data_already_tracked.metric: Action Plan with EPR targets, category-wise (Cat I–IV)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: Target-setting is the planning input; BRSR needs actuals vs. targets, combining both gives the full EPR disclosure

data_already_tracked.metric: Details of plastic packaging purchased from Producers/Importers, by Brand Owner
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: Tracks supply-chain attribution for EPR deduction; BRSR doesn't require supplier-level breakdown but the aggregate volume is reusable

data_already_tracked.metric: Carry bag thickness compliance (75µ pre-Dec 2022; 120µ post-Dec 2022)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Compliance with environmental laws, show-cause / penalty / fine details
data_already_tracked.gap: Thickness is a product-spec compliance check; BRSR captures whether any violation occurred, not the spec itself

data_already_tracked.metric: Collection & segregation infrastructure established, MRFs, collection points
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: EPR applicability, plastic packaging waste collected, recycled, reused
data_already_tracked.gap: Infrastructure details support the EPR narrative; BRSR primarily asks for tonnage outcomes, not infrastructure inventory

data_already_tracked.metric: Single-use plastic (SUP) items phased out, compliance status
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Compliance with environmental laws, show-cause / penalty / fine details
data_already_tracked.gap: SUP ban compliance is binary (yes/no); BRSR captures it only if a violation leads to a penalty or show-cause notice

hazardous_waste_2016.filing_name: Hazardous and Other Wastes (Management and Transboundary Movement) Rules, 2016
hazardous_waste_2016.who_must_file: Occupiers generating/handling hazardous and other wastes, operators of common/captive TSDF, actual users (recyclers, co-processors, pre-processors), importers, exporters, transporters
hazardous_waste_2016.reporting_frequency: Annual (Form 4 by June 30); Ongoing records (Form 3); Per-consignment (Form 10 manifest); Per-incident (Form 11)

data_already_tracked.metric: Total quantity of hazardous waste generated, category-wise per Schedules I/II/III (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires breakup across 8 waste types (plastic, e-waste, bio-medical, C&D, battery, radioactive, other hazardous, other non-hazardous); HWM Rules only cover hazardous and other wastes per Schedules I–III

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity dispatched to authorised disposal facility (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste directed to disposal, landfilling, incineration, other (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires split by disposal method (incineration, landfilling, other disposal); HWM Form 4A reports aggregate dispatch to disposal facility without method breakup at generator level

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity dispatched to recycler / co-processor / pre-processor (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, recycling, reuse, recovery, co-processing (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires split by diversion method (recycling, reuse, other recovery operations); HWM Form 4A aggregates all non-disposal dispatch into one line

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity dispatched to others (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, other operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Catch-all category with no method classification; BRSR needs explicit method tagging for each diversion route

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of hazardous waste utilised in-house (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, reuse/recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR needs classification as reuse vs recycling vs other recovery; HWM reports aggregate in-house utilisation without method split

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of hazardous waste in storage at end of financial year (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT), reconciliation
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR does not separately track closing storage inventory; needed to reconcile waste generated vs waste managed in the year

data_already_tracked.metric: Total quantity of hazardous waste received at TSDF (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Relevant only for TSDF operators reporting their own BRSR; shows inflow but BRSR disclosure is entity-level generation, not facility-level receipt

data_already_tracked.metric: Opening stock of hazardous waste at TSDF (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT), reconciliation
data_already_tracked.gap: Useful for year-over-year waste flow reconciliation; BRSR does not require opening stock disclosure

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of hazardous waste treated at TSDF (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste directed to disposal, other disposal operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires treatment method classification; HWM reports aggregate treatment quantity without method detail

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity disposed in secured landfills, as-is and after treatment (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste directed to disposal, landfilling (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Direct match for hazardous waste landfilling quantity; BRSR also needs non-hazardous waste landfilling data from other sources

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity incinerated at TSDF (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste directed to disposal, incineration (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Direct match for hazardous waste incineration; BRSR also needs non-hazardous incineration data from other sources

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity processed by methods other than treatment/landfill/incineration (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste directed to disposal, other disposal operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Catch-all processing category; BRSR needs specific method classification for each disposal operation

data_already_tracked.metric: Closing stock of hazardous waste at TSDF (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT), reconciliation
data_already_tracked.gap: Useful for waste flow reconciliation; no direct BRSR field for closing inventory

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of waste received from domestic sources by recycler/user (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Tracks inbound waste for recyclers/actual users; BRSR reports generation at entity level, not receipt-based tracking

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of waste imported by recycler/user (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR does not separately track imported waste; relevant for entities importing waste as feedstock

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity recycled / co-processed / used by actual user (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, recycling, co-processing (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires split by diversion method (recycling vs reuse vs other recovery); HWM aggregates all into one line

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of products dispatched from recycling/recovery operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste management from lifecycle perspective, reclaimed products
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR Leadership Indicator asks about reclaimed products and packaging with lifecycle context; HWM tracks output products but not in lifecycle framing

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of secondary waste generated from recycling operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Captures secondary hazardous waste from processing; BRSR needs all waste types including non-hazardous secondary waste

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of waste disposed from recycling operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste directed to disposal (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires disposal method breakup (incineration/landfilling/other); HWM reports aggregate disposal quantity

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of waste re-exported (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, other recovery operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR has no explicit re-export field; could be classified under other recovery/diversion depending on end use

data_already_tracked.metric: Closing stock of waste at recycler/user facility (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT), reconciliation
data_already_tracked.gap: Useful for waste flow reconciliation; no direct BRSR field

data_already_tracked.metric: Date-wise record of waste type handled with Schedule I/II/III category
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM categorises by Schedule I (38 process-based) and Schedule II (constituent-based); BRSR uses 8 standardised waste categories, a mapping table between the two taxonomies is required

data_already_tracked.metric: Total quantity of each waste type handled, generated or received (MT)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Granular consignment-level data; needs aggregation for BRSR. Covers only hazardous/other waste, not all BRSR waste types

data_already_tracked.metric: Method of storage for each waste type
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM records are structured and tabular; BRSR requires a narrative description of management practices

data_already_tracked.metric: Destination of waste dispatched, name/address of actual user or TSDF
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste management, disposal/recovery details (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM tracks destination entity; BRSR needs method-based classification (recycling/reuse/recovery/incineration/landfilling) not entity names

data_already_tracked.metric: Date of environmental monitoring as per authorisation or CPCB guidelines
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Air emissions, NOx, SOx, PM, POP, VOC, HAP and other significant emissions
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM monitoring covers waste-facility specific emissions and effluents; BRSR requires comprehensive facility-wide air emission data across all sources

data_already_tracked.metric: Waste description per consignment (name, category, physical form)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Consignment-level data can be aggregated for BRSR; manifests track only inter-facility transfers, not total generation

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity per consignment (m³ or MT) and number of containers
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Needs aggregation across all manifests for annual total; unit conversion (m³ to MT) may be required

data_already_tracked.metric: Physical form of waste, solid/semi-solid/sludge/oily/tarry/slurry/liquid
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR does not require physical form classification; useful internally for waste characterisation and handling

data_already_tracked.metric: Date, time, sequence of events, and details of accident involving hazardous waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of significant spills (number and quantity recovered/unrecovered)
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM tracks accidents broadly (fire, spill, explosion); BRSR specifically asks for number of spills and quantity split between recovered and unrecovered

data_already_tracked.metric: Details of hazardous waste type and quantity involved in accident
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of significant spills, quantity and waste type
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM captures waste type involved; BRSR needs explicit recovered vs unrecovered quantity split

data_already_tracked.metric: Emergency measures taken and steps to prevent recurrence of accident
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of significant spills, corrective action taken
data_already_tracked.gap: Direct match; HWM accident report covers both corrective and preventive actions

data_already_tracked.metric: Products and by-products manufactured, names and quantity per annum
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Products/services sold, top 5 products by turnover
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM captures production data for waste-generation context; BRSR requires revenue-linked product details with turnover contribution

data_already_tracked.metric: Process description with inputs and outputs, raw materials, chemicals, products, by-products, wastes, emissions, wastewater
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM process flowsheet is input-output technical; BRSR wants a narrative on waste management practices and policies

data_already_tracked.metric: Characteristics of each waste type generated, physical, chemical, biological properties
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type, hazardous waste classification basis
data_already_tracked.gap: Detailed characterisation enables correct classification; BRSR requires only aggregated quantity per category, not constituent-level data

data_already_tracked.metric: Capacity and mode of secured storage within plant premises
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Storage infrastructure details; BRSR needs practice-level narrative, not infrastructure specs

data_already_tracked.metric: Details of in-house utilisation of hazardous waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, reuse/recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Describes utilisation method at authorisation time; BRSR needs annual quantitative data per method

data_already_tracked.metric: Transportation arrangements to actual users / TSDF
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Transport logistics detail; BRSR captures this at narrative level only

data_already_tracked.metric: Environmental safeguards and facilities for safe handling of hazardous waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Infrastructure-focused description; BRSR requires outcome and policy-focused narrative

data_already_tracked.metric: Emergency Response Plan, spill, leak, fire procedures, off-site mitigation, staff training
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of safety-related incidents and safety management system
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM ERP covers hazardous-waste-specific emergencies only; BRSR requires broader OHS management system details (IS 45001 or equivalent)

data_already_tracked.metric: TSDF facility details, layout, storage capacity, treatment processes and capacities, landfill, incineration, leachate system, fire-fighting, environmental management plan
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Comprehensive facility-level infrastructure data; BRSR requires a summary narrative, not facility design details

data_already_tracked.metric: Recycler/user installed capacity as per DIC registration
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, recycling capacity (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Capacity data, not actual throughput; BRSR needs actual quantities recycled/reused/recovered per year

data_already_tracked.metric: Pollution control systems, ETP, scrubbers, mode of disposal of residual waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Air emissions, details of pollution control equipment
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM covers waste-facility pollution controls; BRSR requires entity-wide emission data and pollution control details

data_already_tracked.metric: Occupational health and safety measures for workers handling hazardous waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of safety-related incidents and OHS management
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM covers OHS for waste handling specifically; BRSR requires entity-wide OHS system, training hours, and incident rates

data_already_tracked.metric: Waste management hierarchy compliance, prevention, minimisation, reuse, recycling, recovery, disposal steps followed
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM mandates hierarchy compliance; BRSR requires descriptive narrative with quantitative evidence of each step

data_already_tracked.metric: Training, equipment and safety information provided to workers at hazardous waste site
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of safety-related training given to employees and workers
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM mandates site-specific safety training provision; BRSR requires training hours, coverage %, and topics across all employees/workers

data_already_tracked.metric: Registration of workers involved in recycling, pre-processing and utilisation activities
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Employee/worker details, permanent, contract, casual workers
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM tracks worker registration for hazardous waste activities; BRSR requires comprehensive entity-wide employee and worker details by category

data_already_tracked.metric: Industrial skill development activities for workers in recycling/pre-processing
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of safety-related training, topic, hours, coverage
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM covers waste-specific skill development; BRSR requires all safety and skill training details with hours and topic breakdown

data_already_tracked.metric: Annual monitoring of safety and health of workers in recycling/pre-processing
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Safety-related incidents, fatalities, injuries, LTIFR, measures taken
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM mandates annual health monitoring for waste workers; BRSR needs LTIFR, fatality count, and incident rates across all workers entity-wide

data_already_tracked.metric: Storage duration compliance, max 90 days, extendable to 180 days per Rule 8 conditions
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Storage duration compliance is operational detail; BRSR captures storage practices at narrative level only

data_already_tracked.metric: Records of sale, transfer, storage, recycling, recovery, pre-processing, co-processing and utilisation of hazardous waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, recycling, reuse, recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Transaction-level records available; need aggregation and method classification for BRSR

data_already_tracked.metric: TCLP concentration values for 61 Class A constituents, metals, organics, pesticides (mg/l)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type, hazardous waste classification basis
data_already_tracked.gap: Analytical data used to classify waste as hazardous; BRSR requires aggregated MT by category, not constituent concentrations

data_already_tracked.metric: STLC concentration values for 18 Class A constituents, metals, PCBs, dioxins (mg/l)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type, hazardous waste classification basis
data_already_tracked.gap: Used for hazardous determination via WET procedure; BRSR does not require constituent-level analytical data

data_already_tracked.metric: TTLC concentration values, asbestos (mg/kg) and Total Petroleum Hydrocarbons (mg/kg)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type, hazardous waste classification basis
data_already_tracked.gap: Used for hazardous/non-hazardous determination; BRSR needs quantity, not concentration limits

data_already_tracked.metric: Hazardous characteristics assessment, flammability (C1), corrosivity (C2), reactivity (C3), toxicity (C4), eco-toxicity (C12) and 9 other characteristics
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type, hazardous waste classification basis
data_already_tracked.gap: Classification tool only; BRSR needs categorised quantities, not characteristic test results

data_already_tracked.metric: Used oil quality parameters, PCB (<2ppm), lead (100ppm), arsenic (5ppm), Cd+Cr+Ni (500ppm), PAH (6%)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated, other hazardous waste (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Quality specs determine if oil qualifies for recycling vs disposal; BRSR only needs aggregate used oil quantity under hazardous waste

data_already_tracked.metric: Waste oil fuel specification, sediment, lead, arsenic, halogens, sulphur, water content, PAH
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, co-processing/energy recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Specs determine eligibility for energy recovery; BRSR needs quantity of waste used for energy recovery, not specs

data_already_tracked.metric: Labelling details per container, waste category, Schedule II/III characteristics, incompatible substances, quantity, date, sender/receiver identity
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Confirms safe handling compliance; BRSR captures handling practices at narrative level

data_already_tracked.metric: Transport Emergency Card, waste type, physical/chemical properties, exposure hazards, first aid requirements, spill/fire procedures
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Safety-related incidents and occupational health management
data_already_tracked.gap: TREM card data supports transport safety management; BRSR requires OHS system certification (IS 45001) and aggregate incident reporting

data_already_tracked.metric: Financial penalties levied by SPCB for rule violations (with CPCB approval)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Environmental compliance, fines, penalties, action taken by regulatory authorities
data_already_tracked.gap: Direct match; BRSR asks for all environmental non-compliance fines/penalties including amounts and corrective action

data_already_tracked.metric: Liability for damages to environment or third party due to improper handling
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Environmental compliance, show cause notices, litigation, monetary penalties
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM establishes liability; BRSR requires details of all environmental litigation, show cause notices, and monetary penalties across all regulations

data_already_tracked.metric: Self-certified compliance report for effluent/emission standards and authorisation conditions
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Environmental compliance, status across all environmental regulations
data_already_tracked.gap: HWM compliance is hazardous-waste-specific; BRSR requires compliance status across all applicable environmental laws

data_already_tracked.metric: Authorisation status, valid/suspended/cancelled, conditions, validity period
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Environmental compliance, regulatory approvals status
data_already_tracked.gap: Covers HWM authorisation only; BRSR needs status of all environmental clearances and consents

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of hazardous waste imported, Basel number, chemical composition, source country, port of entry
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Total waste generated by type (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Import quantities contribute to waste handled; BRSR does not separately track imported waste streams

data_already_tracked.metric: Quantity of hazardous waste exported, Basel number, destination country, prior informed consent status
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, other recovery operations (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR has no explicit export category; exported waste for recycling could be counted as diverted from disposal

data_already_tracked.metric: Insurance coverage for transit and accidental occurrence during import/export of hazardous waste
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Briefly describe waste management practices adopted
data_already_tracked.gap: Insurance details not required by BRSR; supports narrative on risk management practices

data_already_tracked.metric: Passbook record of hazardous waste purchased by authorised actual user
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Waste diverted from disposal, recycling, reuse, recovery (MT)
data_already_tracked.gap: Transaction-level purchase record; needs aggregation for BRSR annual disclosure

data_already_tracked.metric: No Objection Certificate from both SPCBs for inter-state transport for disposal
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Environmental compliance, regulatory approvals status
data_already_tracked.gap: Operational compliance record; BRSR does not require transport-specific approval details

data_already_tracked.metric: Prior intimation to SPCBs of both states for inter-state transport for recycling/utilisation
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Environmental compliance, status of compliance
data_already_tracked.gap: Operational compliance; BRSR captures this at aggregate compliance level only

ghg_intensity_2025.filing_name: Greenhouse Gases Emission Intensity Target Rules, 2025
ghg_intensity_2025.authority: MoEFCC (notification) / BEE (certificate issuance) / CPCB (enforcement & environmental compensation)
ghg_intensity_2025.who_must_file: Obligated entities in Aluminium (Smelter, Refinery), Cement (PPC, White Cement, Grinding Unit), Chlor-Alkali, and Pulp & Paper (Integrated Plant, RCF/Imported Pulp) sectors as listed in the Schedule

data_already_tracked.metric: Total GHG emissions, Scope 1 + Scope 2 combined (tCO2e)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions (tCO2e)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR requires Scope 1 and Scope 2 reported as separate line items. This filing tracks only the combined total used to compute intensity.

data_already_tracked.metric: GHG emission intensity, achieved (tCO2e per tonne of equivalent product)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: GHG emission intensity (per rupee of turnover; optional: per physical output)
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR mandates intensity denominated in rupees of turnover. Physical-output intensity is only an optional additional disclosure. This filing provides physical-output intensity only.

data_already_tracked.metric: GHG emission intensity, baseline (tCO2e/t, FY 2023-24)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Scope 1 + Scope 2 GHG emissions and intensity
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks for current FY and previous FY values. Baseline intensity from 2023-24 is useful for YoY comparison but BRSR does not require a fixed regulatory baseline figure.

data_already_tracked.metric: GHG emission intensity, government-assigned target (tCO2e/t for FY 2025-26 and FY 2026-27)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Does the entity have any project related to reducing GHG emissions? If yes, details of target and progress.
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks whether the entity has set emission reduction targets and qualitative details of mechanisms. This filing supplies the mandatory quantitative target but not the entity's own strategy, initiatives, or capex deployed toward reduction.

data_already_tracked.metric: Total equivalent product output, compliance year (tonnes)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Energy intensity per rupee of turnover / optional per physical output
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR uses physical output as optional denominator for energy intensity. This filing provides production volume for GHG intensity but does not track energy consumption (fuel, electricity, other sources) required by BRSR E1.

data_already_tracked.metric: Total equivalent product output, baseline (tonnes, FY 2023-24)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of business activities, turnover and production volumes by segment
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks for turnover contribution by product/service. Baseline tonnage gives historical production volume but not revenue-denominated data.

data_already_tracked.metric: Carbon credit certificates issued / earned (for over-achievement against intensity target)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Does the entity have projects related to reducing GHG? Carbon credits generated.
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps to BRSR Leadership Indicator on carbon credits generated. No material gap.

data_already_tracked.metric: Carbon credit certificates purchased (to cover shortfall against intensity target)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Carbon credits purchased
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps to BRSR Leadership Indicator on carbon credits purchased. No material gap.

data_already_tracked.metric: Carbon credit certificates banked (surplus carried forward after compliance)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Carbon credits generated / purchased
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks for credits generated and purchased but does not have a dedicated field for banked/carried-forward balance. Useful supplementary context for BRSR narrative.

data_already_tracked.metric: Carbon credit certificates surrendered (retired against shortfall)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Carbon credits generated / purchased
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR does not explicitly ask for retired/surrendered credits. This is compliance-mechanism data that goes beyond current BRSR scope but strengthens the disclosure narrative.

data_already_tracked.metric: Shortfall in GHG intensity target (computed as (Achieved − Target) × Output, in tCO2e-equivalent certificates)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of GHG emission reduction target and progress
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks qualitatively about progress toward targets. The quantified shortfall is a stronger datapoint but has no dedicated BRSR field, must be narrated in the qualitative response.

data_already_tracked.metric: Environmental compensation imposed for non-compliance (INR, = 2× average traded price of carbon credits × shortfall)
data_already_tracked.frequency: As applicable (within 90 days of CPCB order)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of environmental non-compliances, show-cause notices, fines, penalties from CPCB/SPCB
data_already_tracked.gap: Directly maps. BRSR E11 requires disclosure of all environmental penalties including amount, corrective action, and authority. Environmental compensation under these rules is one such penalty.

data_already_tracked.metric: Registration on Indian Carbon Market (ICM) portal, registration number and entity details
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of registration/membership with trade bodies, industry associations, regulatory frameworks
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR asks broadly about affiliations and registrations. ICM registration is one data point; BRSR requires a comprehensive list across all regulatory frameworks.

data_already_tracked.metric: Sector and sub-sector classification under Indian Carbon Market (e.g., Aluminium–Smelter, Cement–PPC, Chlor-Alkali, Pulp & Paper–Integrated)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Details of business activities, products/services, NIC codes
data_already_tracked.gap: BRSR uses NIC codes for activity classification. ICM sector labels are scheme-specific and do not map 1:1 to NIC codes, but confirm the entity's industrial profile.

data_already_tracked.metric: Compliance year (financial year for which targets apply)
data_already_tracked.maps_to_brsr_label: Financial year for which reporting is done
data_already_tracked.gap: Both use the Indian financial year (April–March). Note: FY 2025-26 targets are pro-rated from September 2025 to March 2026 per Note 2 of the Schedule.
